use_cases: Landing page feature grids showcasing product capabilities
Portfolio layouts displaying creative work samples
Dashboard widgets for analytics and metrics visualization
Product showcase sections with animated previews
Creative agency websites with interactive grid layouts
ai_summary: A Bento Grid layout component featuring animated, glass-morphism styled cards. Includes TypeTester with scale animations, LayoutAnimation with dynamic grid transitions, and SpeedIndicator sub-components. Built with Framer Motion for smooth morphing effects and responsive design, making it ideal for modern landing pages and feature showcases.
